notes: scripts/build-deb.sh reads scripts/VERSION and defaults the package tree to /tmp/solace-browser-pkg.
The built package includes the browser binary, packaged Yinyang launcher, packaged yinyang-server.py, user service unit, and desktop entry.
The packaged launcher sets SOLACE_REPO_ROOT=/usr/lib/solace-browser so the installed service resolves yinyang-server.py without repo-local state.
